text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue training as Mayano's debut draws
closer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! ☆ I finished my third lap on the dirt track!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ I've still got lots of fuel left too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'mon, what should I do next?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Considering all my training regimens up until now,
don't you think today was on the easy side?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. I specifically made today's training
lighter, with an emphasis on racing on the dirt
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still growing, so I don't want to put too
much of a burden on her legs...
choice_data_list:
Do you want to do something a bit more
intense?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I want something more than "a bit" more
intense!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run in the Twinkle Series, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited, and there's so much to learn!
Everyone who runs there is so twinkly...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna race in the Twinkle Series, I have to get
faster!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! On top of that...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You think I can do even more, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! An A+ for Maya! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, the two of us begin to build on the
basic formula by trying out various training
methods...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Studying races... Studying?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ♪ It feels like I'm dashing up the stairs to
adulthood. ☆
choice_data_list: This is also a form of training, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know. ☆ It's just that I'm very good at
studying!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The video's already over? But it's only been thirty
minutes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! You're just trying to keep me on my
toes.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So this... is how adults tease each other! ☆ Eee! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Actually...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. That's enough with this video.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Number one is going to dash ahead like vroom! at the third turn.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I can already tell. Go ahead and check if
I'm right if you want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's brought it up, I fast forward the video
to check...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: See? ☆ Just like I said!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Let's do another one! Keep 'em coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We end up watching all of the videos I prepared...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh. Was that really the last video?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! Fine by me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We move to the pool to do some cardio.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're going to test how far I can go without
taking a breath, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
By the way, how far do I have to go for you to say
I'm the best?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seventy-five meters is pretty standard for a racer
experienced in this training. Since this is her first
time, one hundred meters would really be
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I've heard there was a racer that went for 300
meters. Well, since we're here...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why couldn't I do it?! I only got halfway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even halfway—or 150 meters—is still a great
record. If she keeps practicing, she might actually
reach 300 meters...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Lemme try again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll get to 300 meters next time! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I didn't think I'd need to do it twice.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But I think I figured it out while I was swimming.
How to save up my energy, that is. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! So I wanna try it out right away!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
By the way, if I get it this time, you have to come
up with some more training for me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heehee! ☆ Do you copy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A short while later, I find myself struggling to
come up with something new for her.
